name: No Bake Best Blueberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the berries evenly in the pie shell.
2. In a 4-cup glass measure, mix together sugar, cornstarch, salt, and cinnamon.
3. Stir in water until well combined. Microwave uncovered on high, stirring every minute, for 3 to 4 minutes or until thickened and clear.
4. Add sherry and lemon juice; stir to combine.
5. Pour the filling over the fruit in the pie shell.
6. Refrigerate at least 2 hours before serving.
- No attribution line included as per instructions.
